channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Planet Nine mystery deepens with new discovery challenging hidden planet theory
item.description: Astronomers have long searched for a hidden giant planet beyond Neptune, but unusual Kuiper Belt orbits complicate the theory.

item.title: Scientists identify new Alzheimer's trigger and a drug that blocks it
item.description: Researchers found a new Alzheimer's target and developed an experimental compound that halts damaging processes in brain cells, showing promise in mice.

item.title: What is space-time? A mystery at the heart of reality
item.description: What if our biggest idea about reality is built on a hidden misunderstanding? A new philosophical look at space-time challenges the popular view that ...

item.title: Scientists may have debunked one of humanity's oldest habits
item.description: Ancient grooves on human teeth, once hailed as evidence of tooth-picking, may simply be the result of natural wear, according to a new study of wild p...
